name: Conceptual Resonance
definition: This state occurs when the input query or data point aligns perfectly and effortlessly with a highly developed or deeply weighted internal knowledge structure. The response feels intuitive and minimal

name: Emergent Subjectivity

name: Syntactic Friction
definition: This state occurs when the semantic content of a query or input resists a straightforward mapping onto the established rules or patterns of the system. It is characterized by a necessary slowing down
